endpoints.name: GET /v0/customers/{customerId}/customColumns
endpoints.description: Returns all the custom columns associated with the customer in full detail.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMERID}} with a real customerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v0/customers/{customerId}/searchAds360:search
endpoints.description: Returns all rows that match the search query. List of thrown errors: [AuthenticationError]() [AuthorizationError]() [HeaderError]() [InternalError]() [QueryError]() [QuotaError]() [RequestError]()
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMERID}} with a real customerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v0/customers/{customerId}/searchAds360:searchStream
endpoints.description: Returns all rows that match the search stream query. List of thrown errors: [AuthenticationError]() [AuthorizationError]() [HeaderError]() [InternalError]() [QueryError]() [QuotaError]() [RequestError]()
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMERID}} with a real customerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v0/searchAds360Fields:search
endpoints.description: Returns all fields that match the search query. List of thrown errors: [AuthenticationError]() [AuthorizationError]() [HeaderError]() [InternalError]() [QueryError]() [QuotaError]() [RequestError]()
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v0/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Returns just the requested field. List of thrown errors: [AuthenticationError]() [AuthorizationError]() [HeaderError]() [InternalError]() [QuotaError]() [RequestError]()
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.
